summary:
GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS AND MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT: Brandon shares prophetic visions concerning Israel and the Middle East, detailing that Benjamin Netanyahu will declare Israel a sovereign nation and act unilaterally against Iran. Brandon foresees Israel striking enriched nuclear sites in the mountains, triggering what he calls a great betrayal and the events of Ezekiel 38 and 39. According to Brandon, this will lead to a rise in global anti-Semitism, prompting Jewish people to flee places like New York for Israel. Furthermore, Brandon describes a grim future involving Russia, Turkey, and Syria, where Damascus becomes a ruinous heap and chemical weapons cause horrific casualties in Israel.

CUBAN LIBERATION AND HISTORICAL REVELATIONS: Brandon recounts seeing historical secrets linked to the Bay of Pigs, John F. Kennedy, and the torture of Latino men in secret facilities. Brandon describes a spiritual darkness over Cuba, symbolized by voodoo imagery, a fox, and a witch in a top hat, which God is actively lifting. Brandon predicts that Donald Trump will shift his focus to Cuba to liberate its people, with Marco Rubio playing a key role in leading this charge and gaining immense favor among Latinos. Brandon notes that recent symbolic earthquakes in Havana are physical manifestations of this impending liberation, which will bring wealth, prosperity, and the destruction of hidden incriminating evidence by corrupt actors.

UNITED STATES POLITICS AND FINANCIAL SHIFTS: Brandon discusses an ongoing spiritual and political battle over wealth, specifically highlighting the Clarity Act and cryptocurrency. Brandon warns that bankers like JP Morgan are actively lobbying senators to derail this legislation, which he views as a crucial mechanism for transferring wealth to the righteous to fund global revivals. On the political front, Brandon predicts that Gavin Newsom will run for president in 2028, potentially alongside Michelle Obama, describing Newsom as a deceptive figure aligned with the Illuminati and the spirit of Moloch. Brandon also heavily criticizes current political corruption, claiming that billions of dollars in Ukrainian aid are being laundered through secret foreign accounts to fund American political campaigns.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND GLOBALISM: Brandon warns of imminent domestic threats, specifically referencing coordinated attacks on the 911 emergency infrastructure and major telecommunications networks like AT&T. Brandon views recent 911 outages across multiple states as trial runs for a larger Red Dawn style attack that will target hospitals, malls, and major events around the United States' 250th anniversary. Additionally, Brandon highlights the dangers of globalism, pointing to figures like Mark Carney and Emmanuel Macron as architects of a new world order driven by digital IDs and the suppression of free speech, while also mentioning spiritual warfare over Europe involving a resurgent Hitler spirit in Germany.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND SPIRITUAL AWAKENING IN AFRICA: Brandon passionately prays against the spread of the Ebola virus in Africa, declaring divine healing and protection over the continent. Brandon foresees a massive spiritual awakening in Africa, including miraculous resurrections where deceased witch doctors return to life to testify about heaven and hell, ultimately leading many to salvation. Finally, Brandon experiences a profound vision of God's glory, goodness, and mercy passing over the people, which he interprets as a divine rebirthing of America and a massive, unprecedented harvest of souls globally.
rawData: [June 16, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/yCJFoRGfrEc]-[As you come in, let us know where you're from. Where are you from today? We're going to pray for people tonight right off the bat for people's blood pressure. There have been requests from people saying, 'Hey, I need prayer tonight. I'm feeling my blood pressure is too high and not feeling good.' So, we're going to pray for them. I believe that Jesus paid the price for all of us to walk in victory over sickness and disease. It doesn't matter what it is. If you've got a toe that's hurting or you've got a diagnosis that says you have only days to live, Jesus Christ paid the price for you to walk in victory over sickness and disease. So, we're just going to start off right now and pray for whatever you have in your body that you're believing God for. You may be believing for blood pressure, like I had a request for blood pressure and feeling weak. So we're going to pray for that right off the bat. We're going to pray for your healing, for your deliverance, for whatever you need in your body. Jesus Christ, by his stripes, we're healed. Jesus Christ, the same yesterday, today, and forever. And if he healed the sick back then, he's healing the sick today. I believe that as he is, so are we in this world, and as it is in heaven. I believe that healing is in heaven and there are no sick people in heaven. So on earth as it is in heaven. I believe if we're walking in heaven on earth, there is no room for the devil to put afflictions on our bodies. We'll have wisdom on how to take care of ourselves by eating right and exercise and doing our part, following what we need to do. But then I believe there's a supernatural on our natural. So, Father, I just thank you, Lord, for every person who is represented here tonight. We call healing and wholeness and wellness over their bodies in the name of Jesus. We call healing over blood pressure. Satan, take your hands off of our blood pressure. We call healing over our blood pressure. We call healing over our blood. We call healing over our hearts and the valves of our hearts. We call healing over us in the name of Jesus. We call healing over our livers, over our pancreases, over our brains, or whatever it may be. Lord, we thank you, Lord, that you are the God that healeth thee. You are the Lord our healer. And we believe that by your stripes we're healed. And we thank you, Lord, that tonight as we are worshipping you, as we're pressing in, we're seeking you, God. We thank you, Lord, that you are our great physician, and you have already done it. When you said it was done, it was finished on the cross. Everything you set out to do was done. It was finished. You took sickness. You took it all for us. And Father, we know we don't need to bear what you took in your body. You took it all. And we thank you, Lord. Jesus paid the whole price for me. Sickness, disease, poverty, lack, and sin, he took it all for us. And we receive it right now in the name of Jesus by faith. We receive healing over our bodies in the name of Jesus. And I believe it for me, too. My nose, everything. I believe it. Do you believe it? We're believing believers. We're not doubters. We're overcomers by the blood of the lamb and by the word of our testimony. And I believe that tonight for you, for me, for your families, for all that are needing healing in their bodies. Receive it now in Jesus' name. So I believe with you. All right. Well, good evening, family. Thank you for joining us tonight. And we're so grateful for every single one of you that are already here. We have over 2,000. But Braden has something really good for you tonight. He's already showed me some of the things that he had and he said, 'Daddy, I want to show these news articles and what's going on.' So, I want him to go ahead and get started and I will interrupt every once in a while and interject what the Lord is showing me concerning it. So, yesterday we were praying and we saw Benjamin Netanyahu. If I mess up his name, I apologize. I saw him saying, 'We are a sovereign nation.' This happened last night about 10 o'clock. I heard him say to President Trump, 'We are a sovereign nation and we will act alone if we need to.' Do you have it ready? The clip of you saying it? Yeah, you can play it if you want. You can play my clip if you want. Which one do you want to go first? You want me to explain it or do you... You can keep his name. Okay. Sovereign nation. We are a sovereign nation and we will act alone if we need to. And he was not satisfied in the vision last night of what was in the mountain. He said, 'We want what's in the mountain and it's enriched dust, the stuff that makes nuclear weapons.' And he said, 'We will not be satisfied with just anything. We will act alone with or without you, the United States.' And I heard him do this, and when I saw this in the spirit, I saw that he did it. He went at them alone. And then I saw in the spirit what was called a great betrayal. I saw the beginning phases of Ezekiel 38 and 39. And they called this a great betrayal. I heard it in the news articles. I saw it in the news articles. There was an escalation of things coming with Israel and Benjamin acting alone. And the Lord showed me... Hey, will you turn down that fan? I'm cold and that's a big deal for me to say that. Thank you, son. My helper. I'm telling you what, I appreciate that boy. He is a hardworking kid. I'm very thankful for Braden. So I saw Benjamin acting alone. Then what did we see? He would strike the mountain. I saw the mountain would glow in the dark. I said, 'What you will see is not the United States doing this.' I've told you this a lot of times. I said, 'I've seen in the spirit that Israel will strike Iran in the days ahead alone and there will be great anti-Semitism across the land. I saw great pressure on Jewish communities coming and that people would flee New York and areas in America and people like John Hagee would fund them going home to Israel. When they get there, I saw them occupying Gaza, occupying places of settlement, saying, 'Listen, we're going to give you part of that land.' And I saw people from the Israeli people—Jews that were going home out of great persecution in the days ahead. I saw great anti-Semitism coming when Israel strikes alone. This is what I saw. Now, can I miss it? Yes. But I saw this and I saw them striking oil wells. I saw them striking things. And people say, 'Brandon, do you still see oil going to $200 a barrel?' I haven't seen it recently. So I don't know. Prayer changes things. I believe with all my heart. I saw Israel. I saw all this that's going on. But when you see in part and you hear in part, I don't know where I'm seeing and what part I'm seeing and what part I'm hearing. All I know is that there's an escalation. And I saw Israel acting alone. But when this happened, I saw the hook in the jaw. I saw Russia. I saw Turkey rise up with Syria. I saw a wounded brother coming in the days ahead with Syria. And I saw Turkey coming to the aid of Syria. And I saw Damascus becoming a ruinous heap. I saw chemical weapons being used against Israel in the middle of the night on like an October attack. And the Lord said, 'You must pray for the people, the innocent civilians, the bystanders in these areas.' I saw people that had boils and stuff all over their bodies and they were in convulsing pain as they died—not instantaneously but after a couple minutes of a very bad death. It was terrible to the point where I saw their backbone breaking and convulsing. Now, I don't know, it's like Hollywood, but it was a very gruesome death what I saw. The Lord said, 'Pray for this.' I saw this coming. I saw an escalation. I saw Ezekiel 38 and 39. The Lord said, 'Ezekiel 38 and 39 is at your door. You don't even realize it; it's coming.' All I know is when I hear Sister Billie and them talk about Ezekiel 38 and 39, that means the Rapture is getting really close. Jesus is coming. People say, 'Well, Brandon, do you believe we're going to see George get to 17 or 18 years old?' I don't know. I see a vision of what I'm telling you. That could be the Tribulation. I don't know when I'm seeing it; I see George in the kingdom and there is something about the end times, but it was in the Tribulation. Everything Brad and I talk about all the time are visions the Lord gave to me and I said, 'I see him helping and being a forerunner, talking about the Antichrist and the little boy, George.' Go ahead and let's hear today after what we saw. We saw the Bay of Pigs. Now, excuse my ignorance, but I don't know what the Bay of Pigs is; I didn't even have a clue. My son and my wife explained it to me. I saw JFK's face. I saw JFK. I saw things that were held in secret. I saw rooms that had bulbs in them that had bars on the windows, and they were taking Latino men with olive looking skin. They were torturing these men with chemical and psychological warfare. These men were tortured greatly in a room; there were a lot of them. I could see them and they would bring them in and use their bodies for experiments and torture. I saw files and I saw a fox in what I call the Bay of Pigs on the island of Cuba. This fox was looking at me as I was praying last night. But it was not a small fox; it was a big fox. The fox looked very big; his face was very bushy. He had a hat on and he was looking at me as I was praying last night. I saw a witch with a top hat that looked like a skeleton man. The Lord said, 'This is voodoo.' He had a top hat and I could see the skeleton man. It was symbolic of some kind of witchcraft on Cuba. It was a thin layer, but the Lord said, 'I'm dealing with this.' He was lifting that darkness off of it, and a great shaking is coming to Cuba. The Lord said, 'A major revival is coming; I'm going to liberate the people.' As I saw old loose ends being figured out, Trump was ready to move away from the Iran conflict and move to Cuba. This was not something that would last a long time. But I saw that he would go into Cuba and liberate them quickly and Rubio would help and lead the charge, helping the Cuban people. It was personal. And the Lord said specifically, 'Pray for Marco Rubio in the days ahead for wisdom on how to handle this, for he will slay his tens of thousands and Saul will slay his thousands.' And that was JD Vance. I saw Rubio rise up with great favor with Latinos and the Cuban people and wealth and prosperity come to Cuba with the liberation. People were not fighting it; they were excited and wanted to be free. I didn't see a lot of resistance. I saw pirates. The Lord said, 'Pirates in the Bay of Pigs.' I saw them taking evidence of things that they had from the past and hiding it and getting rid of it. I saw these people knew a liberation was coming, so they were getting rid of damning evidence, incriminating evidence against them for trials that are coming. I saw trials being held for people that were a part of this ongoing conflict. I saw certain entities of the United States government involved, and the Lord said, 'Don't say that,' so I left it alone. I saw a Kennedy and the Lord said specifically, 'Look at Trump with Kennedy.' I heard old alliances with Russia and I saw patches of stars on shoulders. I don't know what that was all about, but as I saw it, I saw a major event about to take place in Cuba with a shaking over the nation and it would be symbolic as earthquakes shake Cuba. The Lord said this last night, 'Earthquakes will shake Cuba, even in the middle of the island.' This will be symbolic of a liberation that is coming to the Cuban people. For what is happening in the spirit is happening in the natural and a shaking to awaken is coming to the Cuban people. That's what I saw last night in the spirit. The Lord said, 'Pray for President Trump, for the Kennedy curse to be broken, to pray for him, to pray for his health, for his body, to pray for him to make it all the way across—the blessing for our nation and the things ahead.' I saw pink currency again. I saw crypto. I saw the Clarity Act, praying for clarity. And then today I saw blockages trying to combat it—JP Morgan and other bankers trying to lobby against the Clarity Act. I saw them trying to throw in a Hail Mary play to disrupt the vote in the Senate to derail it by lobbying. I don't understand it; this is the word I hear. They are lobbying against the Clarity Act with certain senators that were Democrats and trying to lobby against it with the Republicans. The Lord said, 'A lobbying, a lobbying; pray.' I was praying in the Spirit before I did this broadcast and the Lord said they're trying to derail the Clarity Act. Pray for clarity to come to pass. This is part of the wealth transfer. It's not the whole thing; the Lord said there'll be multi-avenues of how he brings the wealth of the wicked laid up for the righteous. So whatever the Lord's telling you—a creative idea, an invention, a book, buying a piece of property—I know the Lord said he's going to bring it to the people to pay off churches, to get school buses to transport people for the revival. I saw people who were believing for buses and vans that needed transportation to go into the inner cities and bring these people into revivals. The Lord said he was going to provide for you. As the cloud goes, you follow the glory cloud. I had Diana reading this book last night about praying into the glory and the travail and the intercession that is going to go forth for this major outpouring of the Spirit of God on all flesh like we've never seen before. What we're going to see—Joel Chapter 2 and the Book of Acts—unfold in this generation. He's going to pour it out on all flesh in a greater capacity. You haven't seen nothing yet compared to what God is about to do in this generation. He's going after the lost, and you're going to see a harvest of souls. Why not both? Can you not believe God for bigger in your life? Why do you have to think so small? God is a big God and he wants no man to perish but all to come to repentance. There are so many people that have such a small-minded mentality that think, "Well, God's only going to move after the rapture of the church, or this or that, or when the tribulation starts and people are all dying and all this stuff." No, I'm telling you, I believe we're going to see it rain. The Holy Ghost outpouring is a rain, and you need to get your umbrella out. I'm going to stand in it. I'll just be out there playing in it because there's a rain coming. Those are people who are resistant, people who have a raincoat and an umbrella. I'm not resisting it; I'm going to get saturated. So, I want you to see now what we saw. I'm giving you highlights of last night. Now, here's Braden's part. What did Israel say today? Benjamin, read, do you have your microphone on? "Trump's agreement does not bind us. We are not partners to it." That's what Israel said exactly what we saw last night. They're not happy; they are sovereign and said they'll act alone. So, the word that we saw is coming to pass. He said, "We killed Hamas's leader and virtually all of them. I think there's still one left; he too will be killed." He's going after these people. He said, "I do not agree with Trump. Therefore, Israel will do whatever it takes to maintain its own security." Let me show the articles real quick because they went away. Trump's agreement does not bind us; we are not partners to it. He was saying they're going after the people still. What we saw last night is manifesting less than 24 hours later. It's an acceleration; prophetic words are happening in real time. The Lord said, "You'll say what's on the news and people will come." It's on the news today. The army is attempting to advance tonight in several sectors in Southern Lebanon, making progression attempts toward Baraka and other locations. Israel's shelling also targets Southern Lebanon. He's defying what Trump said he wanted him to do, just like the Lord said he would, acting alone. There will be anti-Semitism; there's a major event about to take place. This is what the Lord showed us. It's happening. I said, "Benjamin, I'm going to act alone." Then they'll call this a "Great Betrayal" for what happens next. This is what I saw in the spirit. Trump was saying that Iran has agreed to never have a nuclear weapon. Also, the story that the US is paying Iran $300 million is fake news put out by the Democrats. President Donald J. Trump says it's fake news; we're not giving them $300 million. I'm just saying there's something more to it; rumors come from somewhere. Maybe they're just being strife makers. Germany's chancellor—Russia said Germany seems to be showing Nazi instincts again. I told you they would start having witchcraft things with the Pergamon Altar. There are things attached to the Pergamon Altar and Germany. Russia is saying they're acting like that again. I saw them calling forth the Hitler spirit by witchcraft. I saw a swastika coming up out of Berlin that went across Europe like a Batman signal. This is what's going to happen; they're going to call it the Hitler spirit again over Europe. A darkness went out, and I saw World War II. Russia is part of that. Look at the headlines. Germany's Minister of Foreign Affairs stated that the German military will boost the exchange of experience with Ukraine's armed forces, basically with neo-Nazis. Germany seems to be getting rid of mosques and is showing Nazi instincts again. This one he showed me earlier. He said, "Daddy, do you remember I saw Gavin rising up to be the President of the United States?" As he finished in California, he slithered on his belly like a serpent with a forked tongue. He was going from California to Washington, D.C., rising up. I saw Booker coming beside him to try to run as the Democratic nomination for president against Rubio and others. This is Gavin Newsom, and he is a nuisance. I saw him with a purple cloak on; it was the Illuminati. There was grooming with Satan behind him, a wall, and the sacrificing of innocent babies through abortion. That was attached to the spirit of Molech to give strength to this spirit by giving a sacrifice of innocent blood. Listen to what happened today. Federal agents have knocked on doors not because they found a crime, but because they're simply trying to find one. Donald Trump isn't just coming after me because of my tweets; he's coming after me because I'm considering running for president. He's the most corrupt president in American history, turning government into his own personal power ministries to reward cronies and jail his opponents. His personal attorney now runs the Department of Justice, which has repeatedly gone after his political enemies. Ask Jerome Powell. He sent them after James Comey, Tish James, and Adam Schiff. Donald Trump picked the wrong target. We have nothing to hide. His political operatives can take every record and read every page, but they'll be looking in the wrong place. Because if they really want to find corruption, look no further than 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue. Donald Trump is selling the presidency. He's running the largest cash heist in American political history, trading foreign tariff relief for approval of his golf courses, day trading behind the Resolute desk, reaping hundreds of millions of dollars in personal profit. He's doing it through the receipt of a $400 million private jet from a foreign government that he plans to keep when he leaves office through his son's ventures in countries where his own administration is simultaneously making policy. His personal fortune has skyrocketed by $4 billion since making his return to office. This is the behavior of a regime, not a republic. The White House has become a marketplace, a marketplace for sneakers and coins and watches, cologne, guitars, Bibles and phones—influence for sale, access for sale. And today, my family and I can personally confirm that justice is for sale. To Donald Trump, who I know is watching because he watches everything, I have a message for you. You can subpoena my records. You can investigate me. You can harass me. Put my name on every and any enemies list you have. But leave my wife and family out of your personal vendetta. I'd like to say something to my wife: These times are not normal. They're not ordinary. I love you and I'm sorry he's doing this. You have not earned a single one of the indignities that he's trying to inflict on you and our children. And to Donald Trump, this country... I can't listen to him no more. He makes—I'm telling you, the man's bad. And that's basically him throwing his hat in the ring, telling you he's running for president in 2028. Just telling you. And now you'll hear that snake start to slither as it's getting so close to his time to be up over California. And he will slither like a snake. And the Lord said, 'You'll see this.' And I saw him have a cloak on. Now, as they went through President Trump's wife, the First Lady's underwear drawer back when the FBI raided their house at Mar-a-Lago, and went through Barron's private stuff and all her stuff and looked at all her underwear and everything—I, you know, was it personal against his wife? But I think it's interesting where we are and where the Lord told us we would be concerning 2028. And I told you, watch this man. I've told you even last time when I saw it before Trump won, I said, 'I see Gavin. I see Gavin's face.' And we have the videos to prove it. I'm telling you, Gavin will run. I see Gavin. And who is the person I saw run by Gavin? Michelle. No, Michelle Obama. I saw Michelle standing next to him. I saw her being a major voice piece with him. Now, supposedly the Obamas are getting a divorce. So, I don't know. We'll see what happens with this. I saw like an advocate with him, talking with him. So, we'll see in the days ahead what happens. Kind of interesting. Now, I saw the money that was sent to Ukraine was in secret bank accounts. And I said they went into some places in South Africa. I could see them going and I saw certain politicians that had a bunch of money in it. Right now, listen to what happened today. But we're going to cover one thing we broke overnight. A lot of you probably heard about it over the course of the day. The United States government, the National Security Agency, intercepted conversations of President Zelenskyy's government in Ukraine in 2022, late 2022, conspiring with federal workers at USAID to come up with a plan to take $200 million of USAID money—that is your money, folks, taxpayer money—route it through a series of transactions, move it into the United States, and launder it into Joe Biden's 2024 campaign and the Democratic National Committee. Those aren't my words. Those are the words of the FBI informant in the FBI documents that we made public a few months ago. I saw missiles that look like Tomahawk missiles in the days ahead striking by the Kremlin. This is Ukraine. It is Russia striking Ukraine. War is happening. The Lord said they would attack our 911 infrastructure in the days ahead. As we were praying a couple of weeks ago, I saw some kind of SIM card scam that would crowd and take down 911, if anybody remembers that. I said they will use it. And I saw AT&T. Now today, just in, 911 outages are being reported across several US states with officials urging residents to use alternative emergency numbers. This is a trial run. Do you understand? This is a trial run. This is a practice run for what I have seen. What I have seen comes before me all the time: a Red Dawn experience. Not just in America, but in Hawaii and out of the States. I saw malls with Gucci and Louis Vuitton—nice stores in a rich area—with three men that had guns, AK-47s, and such with backpack things going into a mall. I have seen lots of things concerning these drones. Praying for the soccer matches in America that are happening right now, the World Cup. Praying for the parades. Praying for major gatherings. How many times have I said we've got to pray for a parade? Pray for the 250th anniversary. Pray for our president to make it home safe from France. He didn't act like he liked Macron very much. So I'm thankful. At least he can see the man is a snake; he's a mole; he's a bad man. Trump didn't act like he was excited to be there, but he got off the plane and he's safe. We're going to keep him safe and get him home safe, and there ain't no weapon formed against him or his family will prosper in the mighty name of Jesus. I've got to see it again. It's funny. It's like, 'I don't want to touch this guy. Don't touch me.' I love President Trump. Father, we thank You for our president. Bless him, Father. Give him wisdom on how to lead this nation and keep his mind humble. We always give honor and glory to Jesus. We keep ourselves humble before You, Father. We get them across the finish line. We finish the job at hand. I talked to a major pastor in an area and we're going to pray for the elections in Minnesota. We're going to pray for the major elections in Minnesota.
